name: kiss-sorcar
description: The open-source AI coding agent that beats Cursor and Claude Code on Terminal Bench. Free, local, bring your own API key.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: KISS Sorcar runs a local Python backend; opt-in API keys and shell tools require trust.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Start a new conversation with KISS Sorcar.
[New Conversation](command:kissSorcar.newConversation)
[Open Chat](command:kissSorcar.openPanel)

kissSorcar.defaultModel.description: Default LLM model for new conversations

kissSorcar.kissProjectPath.description: Path to KISS project root (auto-detected if empty)

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run copy-kiss
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html
